name: Psychic Tremor
text: Give to the Mantis player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust your alter ego → remove Psychic Tremor from the game. • Discard 1 card from your hand for each confused character you control and each confused enemy. If no cards were discarded this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

flavor: The Swordsman is attempting to dominate the planet for the Cotati. It will empower the Cotati in their mission to eradicate all non-plant life.
name: Death Blossom's Bloom

flavor: Her heart soars at the name “Jacques” -the Swordsman who died throwing himself between her and a tyrant's spite, then sinks when it relives the moment the Prime Cotati re-animated his corpse to wear a face she couldn't help but love.
name: Swordsman
text: Quickstrike. Stalwart. [star] Swordsman's attacks gain piercing. (Mantis' nemesis minion.)

name: Plantman
text: Stalwart. Toughness. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Plantman attacks, his attacks gain overkill. Forced Interrupt: When Plantman is defeated, give the villain a tough status card.

name: Cotati Resiliency
text: Attach to the enemy with the highest printed hit points and without stalwart. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Attached enemy gains stalwart. Hero Action: Spend [mental][physical] resources → discard this card.
